tagline.en: So much to harvest you need a bigger basket!
tagline.da: Saa meget at hoeste, du har brug for en stoerre kurv!

theme.hero_task: Harvest from every bed in one walk

tasks.action: Full garden harvest walk: every bed from A to C

prompt.en: Start at Bed A and walk to Bed C -- pick something from every single bed!
prompt.da: Start ved Bed A og gaa til Bed C -- pluk noget fra hvert eneste bed!

tasks.action: Water all beds (neighbor handles if on vacation)

prompt.en: August heat! Water deeply in the evening.
prompt.da: August varme! Vand dybt om aftenen.

prompt.en: Raspberries ripen fast -- check every day or the birds eat them!
prompt.da: Hindbaer modner hurtigt -- tjek hver dag ellers spiser fuglene dem!

tasks.action: Cut broccoli main head from Bed C when fist-sized

prompt.en: Cut the main head with a sharp knife -- leave the stem for side-shoot broccoli!
prompt.da: Skaer hovedet af med en skarp kniv -- lad stilken staa til side-skuds broccoli!

tasks.action: Pick first sweet peppers from Bed B if turning red

prompt.en: Wait until it's really red -- green ones are okay too but red is sweeter!
prompt.da: Vent til den er helt roed -- groenne er ogsaa okay, men roede er soedere!

growth_events.event: Peppers beginning to turn from green to red

prompt.en: Watch the pepper changing color -- green to orange to red, like a traffic light!
prompt.da: Se peberfrugten skifte farve -- groen til orange til roed, som et trafiklys!

growth_events.event: Tumbling Tom cascading over edge of Bed B with ripe red tomatoes

prompt.en: The Tumbling Tom is hanging over the edge like a tomato waterfall!
prompt.da: Tumbling Tom haenger ud over kanten som et tomat-vandfald!

sowing_tasks.action: Sow ninth (final) succession radish in Bed C
